title: poa nervosa
intro: Poa nervosa, also known as St. Bernard's lousewort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poa nervosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease muscle spasms, and promote relaxation. Poa nervosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
